scope: format-agnostic adapters for real lab, scheme, CAPK, vector, device, and report artifacts
boundary: hash inventory and intake normalization only; external authorities still decide acceptance
integration_manifest: hyperion-integration-manifest.json files may map imported authority artifacts into bundle fields, artifact hash bindings, evidence slots, and release-freeze slots without source changes

adapters.title: Lab and approval artifacts
adapters.security_policy: accept public approval, report, and conformance records only; private signing material is rejected

adapters.title: Scheme and acquirer profile data
adapters.security_policy: accept signed or countersigned public profile material; do not import issuer secrets or private keys

adapters.title: CAPK authority data
adapters.security_policy: accept public CAPK provenance and checksum material only; private key containers are rejected

adapters.title: Lab vector and expected-output data
adapters.security_policy: accept complete vector data and expected outcomes; scenario summaries remain advisory until vectors validate

adapters.title: Device, L1, and PED evidence
adapters.security_policy: accept device, reader, L1, and PED evidence; clear PIN data and private material are never accepted

adapters.title: Coverage, integration, static, fuzz, trace, and security reports
adapters.security_policy: accept masked reports and trace packs; unmasked PAN, PIN, cryptogram, or issuer-script payload evidence must remain external
